title: 3D Rails - Heycronus
description: 3D Rails upgrades Minecraft’s rail system by turning all rails into fully 3D models
body:
![3D Rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1dd82dce05f29f6ef8781f9256866feb219be65_0.webp)

3D Rails upgrades Minecraft’s rail system by turning all rails into fully 3D models, adding depth, detail, and a more polished look to your worlds. This pack enhances railways without changing vanilla gameplay, making transportation systems more immersive and visually appealing.

✨ Features

- Fully 3D rail models
- Enhanced details for all rail types
- More depth and realism in railways
- Keeps vanilla mechanics unchanged
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

🎮 Perfect for

- Builds with trains and rail systems
- Mines, factories, and technical worlds
- Players who want a cleaner and more modern visual style
